notes: Landing card reshuffle + scroll-volume bug. Speaker pair (this knob controls X) moves to the top — the most important fact on the page is the first thing you see. Volume gauge + transport buttons (prev/play/next/mute) + now-playing card promoted out of Advanced and into the landing card, so day-to-day controls are visible without expanding anything. Advanced now holds setup/config only: speaker discovery, sound shape (bass/treble/loudness), gestures editor, log. Page-scroll-over-gauge no longer flies volume to 100 — the wheel handler is removed. Click-and-drag on the gauge still works (Logic-style vertical drag). Removed redundant spkn / Playing-Paused-Muted badge text — the play and mute button icons already convey state.
